questions.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?"
options: She told me not to come here.
He asked if I was coming.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?"" = "He asked, "Are you coming?""
Full sentence: "He asked if I was coming."

questions.sentence: She asked, "Where do you live?" yesterday.
options: She asked, "Where do you live?" yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She asked, "Where do you live?""

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
options: The doctor told me to take medicine.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।" = "She asked where I lived."
Full sentence: "He said, "Do this work.""

questions.sentence: He told me to do this work yesterday.
options: He told me to do this work yesterday.
He told me to do this work.
questions.answer: He told me to do this work.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He told me to do this work."

options: The teacher told us to be quiet.
She told me not to come here.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने कहा, "यहाँ मत आओ।"" = "She said, "Do not come here.""

questions.sentence: She told me _____ to come here.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She told me not to come here."
Correct sentence: "They asked, "Are you ready?""

questions.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।
options: They asked if I was ready.
questions.answer: They asked if I was ready.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।" = "They asked if I was ready."
Full sentence: "He asked, "What are you doing?""

questions.sentence: He asked what I were doing.
options: He asked what I were doing.
He asked what I was doing.
questions.answer: He asked what I was doing.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He asked what I was doing."

options: He asked if I needed help.
The teacher told us to be quiet.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "टीचर ने कहा, "चुप रहो।"" = "The teacher said, "Be quiet.""

questions.sentence: The teacher told _____ to be quiet.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "The teacher told us to be quiet."

questions.sentence: She asked, "When will you come?" yesterday.
options: She asked, "When will you come?" yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She asked, "When will you come?""

questions.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कब आऊँगा।
options: They asked if I was ready.
She asked when I would come.
questions.answer: She asked when I would come.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने पूछा कि मैं कब आऊँगा।" = "She asked when I would come."
Full sentence: "The doctor said, "Take medicine.""

questions.sentence: The doctor told me to take medicine yesterday.
options: The doctor told me to take medicine yesterday.
The doctor told me to take medicine.
questions.answer: The doctor told me to take medicine.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The doctor told me to take medicine."

options: He told me to do this work.
He asked if I needed help.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम्हें मदद चाहिए?"" = "He asked, "Do you need help?""
Full sentence: "He asked if I needed help."
